Reportage Documentation

Group
  Guides

File
  Getting started

Source path
  sources/z-first.repor

Description
  The first guide.

  Declared order 1, so it comes first in its group
  even though its path sorts last.

Case
  Hello world

Description
  Runs the smallest possible command.

Reportage source
    case "prints hello" {
      $ echo hello

      assert {
        exit 0
        stdout contains "hello"
      }
    }

Case
  undocumented sibling case

Reportage source
    case "undocumented sibling case" {
      $ true

      assert {
        exit 0
      }
    }

File
  Second guide

Source path
  sources/a-second.repor

Case
  second guide case

Reportage source
    case "second guide case" {
      $ true

      assert {
        exit 0
      }
    }

File
  Unordered guide

Source path
  sources/m-unordered.repor

Case
  unordered guide case

Reportage source
    case "unordered guide case" {
      $ true

      assert {
        exit 0
      }
    }

Group
  Index

File
  Case-less file

Source path
  sources/no-cases.repor

Description
  A valid source with zero cases still appears in the document.

File
  undocumented

Source path
  sources/undocumented.repor

Case
  fallback case one

Reportage source
    case "fallback case one" {
      $ echo one

      assert {
        exit 0
      }
    }

Case
  fallback case two

Reportage source
    case "fallback case two" {
      $ echo two

      assert {
        exit 0
      }
    } # trailing comment, and the file ends without a final newline

Group
  advanced

File
  Lowercase group

Source path
  sources/advanced.repor

Case
  lowercase group case

Reportage source
    case "lowercase group case" {
      $ true

      assert {
        exit 0
      }
    }
